summary: Critical data persistence bug discovered - useLocalStorage hook fix is not working correctly. Runes and mission data are lost after date navigation, causing lifetime counters to show 0 instead of actual values.

critical_bugs.issue: Data persistence failing - runes and missions lost after date navigation
critical_bugs.impact: Users lose all progress when navigating between dates
critical_bugs.evidence: Completed A-rank mission (100 runes) disappears after date navigation. LocalStorage contains correct data but React state not syncing.

integration_issues.issue: Lifetime mission and rune counters showing 0 instead of actual values
All user progress lost when switching dates
integration_issues.expected_behavior: Runes should persist at 100, mission should remain completed

passed_tests: App loads successfully with correct UI structure
Mission creation modal opens and accepts input correctly
Progress ring updates to 100% when mission completed
Trophy Room displays achievement grid with 8 badges
Reward Shop allows creating custom rewards
Reward Shop buy button disabled when insufficient runes
Toast notifications appear for mission creation/completion
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix useLocalStorage hook data persistence. The useRef implementation is not preventing stale closures. Users lose all progress (runes, missions, lifetime counters) when navigating dates. This breaks core functionality of the gamified productivity app.
